subcodes.first_line: The nations of the world will arm themselves with infernal engines of war... They will therefore try to eliminate religion so as to eliminate prejudice
subcodes.first_line_orig: دول عالم در ازدیاد آلات ناریه میکوشند تا حدیکه مانند تعبان میشوند و بهم میتازند
subcodes.subjects: @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @growth of the Cause, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @war and peace
